title: lannea transulta
intro: Lannea transulta is a species of plant in the Anacardiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lannea transulta include its potential to treat fever, pain, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, Lannea transulta is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, and its leaves can be smoked for its therapeutic effects.
